name: storage-workflow
description: Machine-readable storage workflow definition — receive data, validate, normalize, upsert, maintain relationships, and return status.

operation.description: Operation type: insert, update, upsert, delete

conflictColumn.description: Column to use for conflict detection in upsert

steps.name: Receive Structured Data
steps.description: Accept structured data from upstream layers and validate input format

steps.name: Validate Schema
steps.description: Validate incoming records against target table schema — check required fields, types, constraints

steps.name: Normalize Records
steps.description: Normalize data for storage — trim strings, normalize URLs, compute slugs, set defaults, cast types

steps.name: Begin Transaction
steps.description: Start a database transaction for atomicity

steps.name: UPSERT Records
steps.description: Insert new records or update existing ones — handle conflicts via ON CONFLICT or manual SELECT-then-UPDATE

steps.name: Maintain Relationships
steps.description: Ensure foreign key references are valid — check parent records exist, update related records

steps.name: Commit Transaction
steps.description: Commit the transaction to persist all changes atomically

steps.name: Update Indexes
steps.description: Ensure affected indexes are updated after data changes

steps.name: Compute Statistics
steps.description: Update table statistics — record counts, last modified timestamps

steps.name: Return Storage Status
steps.description: Return structured status — inserted/updated counts, affected rows, duration
